name: discord
description: Discord chat — exposes channels, members, message stream, and the composer for DMs and server channels.
notes: Routes by URL: discord.com/channels/@me is the DM list, /@me/<id> is a DM conversation, /<serverId>/<channelId> is a server channel. DM conversation header renders as `Discord | <DisplayName> (@<username>) (DM)` when both are available (e.g. `Discord | Jtonna (@notboosted) (DM)`), so agents can recognize that the display name and account handle refer to the same person; the response also exposes `recipientUsername` and `recipientDisplayName` as separate fields. The composer renders as `[eN] Message @<recipient> textbox` for DMs or `[eN] Message #<channel> textbox` for server channels, preserving the discriminating prefix so workflows can tell composers apart from the formatted tree alone. Boolean ARIA properties (checked/selected/expanded) are normalized from CDP's stringy 'true'/'false' values into real booleans so consumers can use === true safely.

workflows.name: send_message
workflows.description: Compose a message in the active Discord channel and send it.
